title: FireClient
description: A client side utility mod, specifically made for SMPs
body:
# 🔥 FireClient
FireClient is a Quality of Life Utility mod.

It has a ton of configurable modules and settings that enhance vanilla gameplay, specifically for SMPs

## Highlights:
### Kits
Save, load, edit, and share client side kits!  Kits save to a `.json` file that can be shared. You can also copy and paste from the clipboard. There is even an option to send the kit in chat for others to download!

![Shows the Kit Module](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y2cfRBmm/images/5ec7fc12d4f5581b6046abe8c21895da9e0d7afd_350.webp)
### Coordinates
Show your coordinates, with options to see the other dimensions scaled coordinates, and even open up a popout window to see your coordinates without having them shown in the main game window!
### Big Items
Make certain items render larger so you can see them easier

![Shows the Big Items module](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y2cfRBmm/images/90933179e7821cf9eaa51423c0fc891869592792_350.webp)
### Mute Sounds
Mute certain sounds, preventing them from being heard
### Command utilities
`/ftext` allows you to convert text into ѕᴍᴀʟʟ ᴛᴇхᴛ

`/fcalc` allows you to do math operations and calcuate stack sizes

`/fkit` is a command version of the kits module. They both work with each other seamlessly
### Bug fixes
Has fixes for the extinguish flames sound being spammed, shields blocking the screen when riptiding, and more!
